text:
EVANGELION FLASHBACK is a compilation album by Yoko Takahashi. It was published by King Records via its label KING AMUSEMENT CREATIVE with the catalog number KICA-2641, it was released on 29 October 2025.
 https://vgmdb.net/album/151832 It was made in order to commemorate the 30th anniversary of the EVANGELION series.
